tluaGotoErrors.tlua(3,10): error TS100025: No visible label 'nowhere' for goto.
tluaGotoErrors.tlua(8,10): error TS100025: No visible label 'inner' for goto.
tluaGotoErrors.tlua(18,14): error TS100025: No visible label 'here' for goto.
tluaGotoErrors.tlua(26,7): error TS1114: Duplicate label 'a'.


==== tluaGotoErrors.tlua (4 errors) ====
    // Error: no such label anywhere.
    function missing(): void
        goto nowhere
             ~~~~~~~
!!! error TS100025: No visible label 'nowhere' for goto.
    end
    
    // Error: a label in a nested block is not visible outside it.
    function nestedNotVisible(): void
        goto inner
             ~~~~~
!!! error TS100025: No visible label 'inner' for goto.
        do
            ::inner::
        end
    end
    
    // Error: a label never crosses a function boundary, so it is simply not visible.
    function crossFunction(): void
        ::here::
        local function inner(): void
            goto here
                 ~~~~
!!! error TS100025: No visible label 'here' for goto.
        end
        inner();
    end
    
    // Error: two labels of the same name in one block.
    function duplicate(): void
        ::a::
        ::a::
          ~
!!! error TS1114: Duplicate label 'a'.
        goto a
    end
    
    // Accepted: a nested block may shadow an enclosing label.
    function shadowIsFine(): void
        ::a::
        do
            ::a::
            goto a
        end
        goto a
    end
